system.requirement: Once you fill 5 boxes on your quests legacy track…

abilities.description: Envision the title, sigil, uniform, or tattoo you bear in recognition of your achievements. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection} among those who would know your reputation, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. On a strong hit with a match, your notoriety grows; mark 2 ticks on your bonds legacy track.
When you risk your reputation to overcome a miss, reroll any dice. If you score a miss again, make a mark on this asset. When you have 5 marks, discard this asset.
Once per fight, when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} through threat or leadership, reroll any dice and mark progress on a hit.
